articles.title: Starmer considers political future as pressure to quit mounts
articles.description: It comes as US President Donald Trump says on social media that the PM will resign, in a further blow to the Labour leader.

articles.title: Chris Mason: All eyes on Downing Street - what does the PM say, and when?
articles.description: For the third time in four years, we appear on the brink of a prime minister announcing their plan to leave office, the BBC's political editor writes.

articles.description: The US president, who is not at the talks, had earlier exchanged warnings with Iran's negotiator over clashes between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon.
